title: The other side might call your expert first. A bloke rang me the other week. He was looking for a digital forensics expert to help with a legal matter, but he wouldn't tell me his name. I get it. People want to keep the legal bills down, or they're worried about a sales - LinkedIn

The other side might call your expert first. A bloke rang me the other week. He was looking for a digital forensics expert to help with a legal matter, but he wouldn't tell me his name. I get it. People want to keep the legal bills down, or they're worried about a sales &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
